features.name: case statement with duplicate empty case item
features.description: Code should include a case statement with two case items having the same label, where the first case item has an empty begin-end block and the second case item contains an assignment
features.snippet:
case (a)
  1'b0: begin
  end
  1'b0: begin
    q <= d;
  end
endcase

features.name: empty begin-end block in case item
features.description: Code should include a case statement item with an empty begin-end block that represents a no-op action
